heading: Definition
label: 9801 Definition
text: In this chapter, the term “settle” means consider, ascertain, adjust, determine, and dispose of a claim, whether by full or partial allowance or by disallowance.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)9801[No source].[No source].The revised section is inserted for clarity, and is based on usage in the source laws for this revised chapter.
Amendments1987— inserted “the term” after “In this chapter,”.Pub. L. 100–180
amendments: Amendments1987— inserted “the term” after “In this chapter,”.Pub. L. 100–180
